tasting_notes: A 90/10 Arabica/Robusta blend with low acidity, full body and a balanced medium roast. Built from our mono-origin coffees for a rounder, richer cup.
Our decaffeinated coffee beans, created for customers who want the flavour and balance of Italian-style coffee with no caffeine.
Scents of spicy pepper and chocolatey aftertaste.
Taste of wood and dark caramel, in some cases of bitter cocoa.
Full aroma, mellow and rich taste with spicy and woody hints.
A balanced 70/30 Arabica/Robusta blend made from our mono-origin coffees, with medium acidity, medium body and a classic medium roast.
Citrus notes. Fruity aromatics with notes to strawberry and plum and dark chocolate.
A 50/50 Arabica/Robusta blend made from our mono-origin coffees, with balanced acidity, medium body and a classic medium roast.
A 100% Arabica blend built from coffees from Ethiopia and Honduras, with lively acidity, good body and a medium roast profile.
Fragrance sweet and fruity, with soft notes to caramel. Aroma with notes to cinnamon, almond and cereal.
